tools.name: get-platform-status
tools.title: Get Platform Status
tools.description: Return the current repo-grounded platform status snapshot from versions/stack.yaml.

tools.name: list-recent-receipts
tools.title: List Recent Receipts
tools.description: List the most recent structured live-apply receipts from the repository evidence set.

tools.name: get-deployment-history
tools.title: Get Deployment History
tools.description: Return recent platform deployments filtered by service, environment, or date range.

tools.name: get-workflow-contract
tools.title: Get Workflow Contract
tools.description: Return one workflow execution contract from the canonical workflow catalog.

tools.name: get-command-contract
tools.title: Get Command Contract
tools.description: Return one mutating command contract from the canonical command catalog.

tools.name: get-api-publication-surface
tools.title: Get API Publication Surface
tools.description: Return one classified API or webhook surface from the private-first publication catalog.

tools.name: query-platform-context
tools.title: Query Platform Context
tools.description: Query the private platform-context API for cited RAG matches grounded in ADRs, runbooks, receipts, and platform catalogs.

retrieval_backend.description: The retrieval backend used (e.g. vector, keyword).

tools.name: get-maintenance-windows
tools.title: Get Maintenance Windows
tools.description: Return the currently active ADR 0080 maintenance windows from the private NATS KV bucket through the governed controller query surface.

tools.name: list-serverclaw-skills
tools.title: List ServerClaw Skills
tools.description: Resolve the repo-managed ServerClaw SKILL.md packs with bundled, shared, and workspace-local precedence plus mirrored third-party review state.

tools.name: export-mcp-tools
tools.title: Export MCP Tools
tools.description: Export the governed tool registry as MCP-compatible tool definitions.

tools.name: browser-run-session
tools.title: Browser Run Session
tools.description: Execute one bounded Playwright browser session through the private ADR 0261 browser-runner runtime and return structured outputs plus artifact metadata.
tools.auth: private browser-runner runtime or governed Dify tool bridge

tools.name: run-governed-command
tools.title: Run Governed Command
tools.description: Evaluate approval requirements and optionally execute one named mutating command contract.

tools.name: check-command-approval
tools.title: Check Command Approval
tools.description: Evaluate the approval gate for one mutating command contract without executing it.

tools.name: list-containers
tools.title: List Containers
tools.description: List Docker containers on the local host. Uses Docker socket directly when available, falls back to Portainer API if configured.

source.description: The backend used to list containers (docker-socket or portainer).

tools.name: get-container-logs
tools.title: Get Container Logs
tools.description: Retrieve recent stdout and stderr log lines for a named Docker container. Uses Docker socket directly when available, falls back to Portainer API if configured. Accepts a container name, ID, or ID prefix.

tools.name: list-nomad-jobs
tools.title: List Nomad Jobs
tools.description: List all jobs in the Nomad cluster with their current status, type, and allocation summary.

namespace.description: Filter jobs by namespace. Use '*' for all namespaces.

tools.name: get-nomad-job-status
tools.title: Get Nomad Job Status
tools.description: Get detailed status of a specific Nomad job including allocations and deployment state.

job_id.description: The Nomad job ID to query.

tools.name: dispatch-nomad-job
tools.title: Dispatch Nomad Batch Job
tools.description: Dispatch a parameterized Nomad batch job with the given metadata. Only works for jobs with a parameterized stanza.

job_id.description: The parameterized Nomad job ID to dispatch.

meta.description: Key-value metadata to pass to the dispatched job.

tools.name: list-plane-tasks
tools.title: List Plane Tasks
tools.description: List issues in a Plane project with optional state filter. Defaults to the Agent Work (AW) project.

project.description: Plane project identifier (default: AW). Use ADR for architecture decisions.

state_name.description: Filter tasks by state name (e.g. Todo, In Progress, Done).

tools.name: get-plane-task
tools.title: Get Plane Task Details
tools.description: Get full details of a single Plane issue by its UUID.

issue_id.description: UUID of the Plane issue to retrieve.

tools.name: create-plane-task
tools.title: Create Plane Task
tools.description: Create a new issue in a Plane project. Use this to track blockers, follow-up tasks, and operational findings.

label_names.description: Label names to apply. Missing labels are auto-created.

priority.description: Priority: none, low, medium, high, urgent.

tools.name: update-plane-task
tools.title: Update Plane Task
tools.description: Update the status, title, description, or priority of an existing Plane issue.

issue_id.description: UUID of the Plane issue to update.

state_name.description: New state name (e.g. In Progress, Done, Blocked).

priority.description: New priority: none, low, medium, high, urgent.

tools.name: add-plane-comment
tools.title: Add Plane Comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an existing Plane issue. Use for milestone updates, status notes, or blockers.

issue_id.description: UUID of the Plane issue to comment on.

tools.name: list-outline-collections
tools.title: List Outline Collections
tools.description: List all document collections in the Outline wiki (wiki.example.com).

tools.name: search-outline-documents
tools.title: Search Outline Documents
tools.description: Full-text search across Outline wiki documents. Optionally scope to a collection.

collection_id.description: Optional collection UUID to scope the search.

tools.name: get-outline-document
tools.title: Get Outline Document
tools.description: Retrieve the full content (title, markdown text, metadata) of an Outline wiki document by its UUID.

document_id.description: UUID of the document to retrieve.

tools.name: create-outline-document
tools.title: Create Outline Document
tools.description: Create a new document in an Outline wiki collection. Published immediately unless publish=false.

collection_id.description: UUID of the collection to create the document in.

parent_document_id.description: Optional UUID of a parent document (creates a nested document).

tools.name: provision-outline-api-token
tools.title: Provision Outline API Token
tools.description: Provision a new Outline API token by inserting it into the Outline PostgreSQL database via the bootstrap SSH key. Writes the token to .local/outline/admin-auth.json so all Outline agent tools pick it up automatically. Call this when Outline tools return 401 errors or when .local/outline/admin-auth.json is missing. Uses the outline.automation@example.com service account.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key in Outline (default: agent-automation)

dry_run.description: If true, print what would happen without making changes

token_preview.description: First 20 chars + last 4 chars of the provisioned token (never the full token)

auth_file.description: Path to the written admin-auth.json file

tools.name: list-outline-documents
tools.title: List Outline Documents
tools.description: List all documents in an Outline collection by collection ID. Returns id, title, url, parent_document_id, and updated_at for each document. Paginates automatically.

collection_id.description: UUID of the collection to list documents from

tools.name: update-outline-document
tools.title: Update Outline Document
tools.description: Update an existing Outline document by document ID. Accepts title and/or text. At least one must be provided. Marks the document as done and published.

document_id.description: UUID of the document to update

text.description: New Markdown content for the document (optional)

tools.name: upsert-outline-document
tools.title: Upsert Outline Document
tools.description: Create or update an Outline document by title within a collection (idempotent). If a document with the given title already exists in the collection it is updated; otherwise a new document is created. Returns outcome: 'created' or 'updated'.

title.description: Document title (used as the unique key within the collection)

parent_document_id.description: UUID of parent document for nesting (optional, create-only)

tools.name: delete-outline-document
tools.title: Delete Outline Document
tools.description: Permanently delete an Outline document by document ID. This action is irreversible. Requires human approval.

document_id.description: UUID of the document to delete

tools.name: mempalace-search
tools.title: Search MemPalace
tools.description: Search cross-session memory for past decisions, patterns, and operational context. Returns memories indexed from ADRs, runbooks, and prior agent sessions.

tools.name: mempalace-add-drawer
tools.title: Add MemPalace Drawer
tools.description: Save a discovery, insight, or pattern to MemPalace for retrieval in future sessions. Enables cross-session memory capture.

content.description: Memory content to save (discovery, pattern, insight, solution)

tools.name: mempalace-wake-up
tools.title: MemPalace Wake Up
tools.description: Load critical facts from MemPalace at session start. Retrieves essential context from prior agent sessions.

tools.name: mempalace-status
tools.title: MemPalace Status
tools.description: Get MemPalace palace status and memory counts. Shows total indexed memories and room breakdown.

tools.name: execute-host-command
tools.title: Execute Host Command
tools.description: Execute a shell command directly on any platform host using the host's own shell and binaries (systemctl, journalctl, docker, free, etc). Defaults to runtime-control; set 'host' to target other machines (proxmox, postgres, docker-runtime, build-server, coolify, runtime-comms). Remote hosts are reached via SSH.

command.description: Shell command to execute on the host (e.g., 'df -h', 'free -m', 'systemctl status docker', 'journalctl -u nginx --no-pager -n 50', 'docker ps')

host.description: Target host to run the command on (default: runtime-control)

tools.name: get-disk-usage
tools.title: Get Disk Usage
tools.description: Query disk space usage across all platform VMs with budget comparison from capacity-model.json. Returns per-VM, per-mount metrics (used, total, available, percent) compared against allocated and budget thresholds.

vm_filter.description: Optional list of VM names to query. Omit for all active VMs.

tools.name: provision-account
tools.title: Provision Platform Account
tools.description: Create a Keycloak SSO account in the platform realm. Optionally set an expiry (account_expires_at attribute) and assign Keycloak groups. Returns the generated password so the operator can send login details. Covers 17+ services via OIDC. ADR 0411.

password.description: Password to set. If omitted, a 20-char random password is generated.

expires_in_days.description: Days until the account expires. Sets account_expires_at attribute. Windmill daily reaper (ADR 0412) will disable the account.

groups.description: Keycloak group names to assign. Defaults to ['lv3-platform-viewers', 'grafana-viewers']. Use 'lv3-platform-admins' for admin access.

tools.name: deprovision-account
tools.title: Deprovision Platform Account
tools.description: Disable (or permanently delete) a Keycloak SSO account by username. Disabling (default) is reversible; hard_delete=true is permanent and requires careful consideration. ADR 0411.

username.description: Keycloak username of the account to deprovision

hard_delete.description: If true, permanently delete the user. If false (default), disable (reversible).
